'''鈭歬-zh-k''' ('''kakazhak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unabort|unabort]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-zh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unabort|unabort]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-zh-k
|-
! Lemma
| kakazhak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikazhak|thikazhak]] || [[word:jikazhak|jikazhak]] || [[word:shikazhak|shikazhak]] || [[word:kikazhak|kikazhak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukazhak|thuthukazhak]] || [[word:jujukazhak|jujukazhak]] || [[word:shushukazhak|shushukazhak]] || [[word:kukukazhak|kukukazhak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukazhak|thukazhak]] || [[word:jukazhak|jukazhak]] || [[word:shukazhak|shukazhak]] || [[word:kukazhak|kukazhak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukazhak|thukazhak]] || [[word:jukazhak|jukazhak]] || [[word:shukazhak|shukazhak]] || [[word:kukazhak|kukazhak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekazhak|thekazhak]] || [[word:jekazhak|jekazhak]] || [[word:shekazhak|shekazhak]] || [[word:kekazhak|kekazhak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokazhak|thothokazhak]] || [[word:jojokazhak|jojokazhak]] || [[word:shoshokazhak|shoshokazhak]] || [[word:kokokazhak|kokokazhak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokazhak|thokazhak]] || [[word:jokazhak|jokazhak]] || [[word:shokazhak|shokazhak]] || [[word:kokazhak|kokazhak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokazhak|thokazhak]] || [[word:jokazhak|jokazhak]] || [[word:shokazhak|shokazhak]] || [[word:kokazhak|kokazhak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kazhak|th忙kazhak]] || [[word:j忙kazhak|j忙kazhak]] || [[word:sh忙kazhak|sh忙kazhak]] || [[word:k忙kazhak|k忙kazhak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakazhak|thathakazhak]] || [[word:jajakazhak|jajakazhak]] || [[word:shashakazhak|shashakazhak]] || [[word:kakakazhak|kakakazhak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakazhak|thakazhak]] || [[word:jakazhak|jakazhak]] || [[word:shakazhak|shakazhak]] || [[word:kakazhak|kakazhak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakazhak|thakazhak]] || [[word:jakazhak|jakazhak]] || [[word:shakazhak|shakazhak]] || [[word:kakazhak|kakazhak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakazhak|shakazhak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakazhak|goshakazhak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakazhak|gokishakazhak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakazhakn眉|shakazhakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakazhaknkn眉|goshakazhaknkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakazhakn眉|gokishakazhakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakazhaksh毛|shakazhaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakazhaknksh毛|goshakazhaknksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakazhaksh毛|gokishakazhaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakazhakro|shakazhakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakazhaknkro|goshakazhaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakazhakro|gokishakazhakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakazhakmu|shakazhakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakazhaknkmu|goshakazhaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakazhakmu|gokishakazhakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakazhaksher|shakazhaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakazhaknksher|goshakazhaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakazhaksher|gokishakazhaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakazhakng|shakazhakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakazhaknkng|goshakazhaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakazhakng|gokishakazhakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakazhakya|shakazhakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakazhaknkya|goshakazhaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakazhakya|gokishakazhakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakazhakyam|shakazhakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakazhaknkyam|goshakazhaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakazhakyam|gokishakazhakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakazhakn眉sh毛|shakazhakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakazhaknkn眉sh毛|goshakazhaknkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakazhakn眉sh毛|gokishakazhakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakazhakn眉ro|shakazhakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakazhaknkn眉ro|goshakazhaknkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakazhakn眉ro|gokishakazhakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakazhakn眉mu|shakazhakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakazhaknkn眉mu|goshakazhaknkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakazhakn眉mu|gokishakazhakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakazhaksh毛n眉|shakazhaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakazhaknksh毛n眉|goshakazhaknksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakazhaksh毛n眉|gokishakazhaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakazhaksh毛ro|shakazhaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakazhaknksh毛ro|goshakazhaknksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakazhaksh毛ro|gokishakazhaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakazhaksh毛mu|shakazhaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakazhaknksh毛mu|goshakazhaknksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakazhaksh毛mu|gokishakazhaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakazhakron眉|shakazhakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakazhaknkron眉|goshakazhaknkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakazhakron眉|gokishakazhakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakazhakrosh毛|shakazhakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakazhaknkrosh毛|goshakazhaknkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakazhakrosh毛|gokishakazhakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakazhakromu|shakazhakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakazhaknkromu|goshakazhaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakazhakromu|gokishakazhakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakazhakmun眉|shakazhakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakazhaknkmun眉|goshakazhaknkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakazhakmun眉|gokishakazhakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakazhakmush毛|shakazhakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakazhaknkmush毛|goshakazhaknkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakazhakmush毛|gokishakazhakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakazhakmuro|shakazhakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakazhaknkmuro|goshakazhaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakazhakmuro|gokishakazhakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
